title: [MTR4] Zoomono
description: Resource pack that adds a Monorail train based on Zhester Zoo Monorail  into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
This resource pack is to add a fictional Monorail train into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2025. This train is based on the Chester Zoo Monorail, which closed on 3rd September 2019.

## Chester Zoo Monorail
The Chester Zoo Monorail (aka *Zoofari*) was a monorail system that existed in Chester Zoo from 1991 to 2019. The monorail is one-way only, travelling between Jubilee Square station and Tsavo station. 4 Monorail trains operated on the line, with all of them formed of 4 coaches, and each coach can take up a maximum of 6 passengers. One trip takes around 15 minutes.
The monorail was closed on 3rd September, 2019, due to it being increasingly unreliable, and the system covers less than half of the zoo. Following the closure of the Chester Zoo Monorail, Alton Towers Monorail became the only Monorail system that still operates in Great Britain.

# What will be in this pack?
### Zoomono:
1. Legacy
     Based on the real-life look of the Chester Zoo Monorail.
2. Modern
     Modern railway equipment, such as destination display and level boarding added.
3. Tracks
     Tracks for Zoomono trains

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, the North of England Zoological Society.
